channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: US Conducts Strikes on Iranian Military Targets in Chabahar Port
item.description: The United States launched airstrikes targeting Iran's Chabahar port, specifically the maritime control tower, as part of a series of attacks against Iranian military infrastructure. The strike occurr...

item.title: Lupita Nyong'o's Orange Outfit Video Goes Viral
item.description: A resurfaced video of Lupita Nyong'o dancing in an orange two-piece outfit during a photo shoot has gone viral on social media. The Kenyan-Mexican Oscar winner showcased her confidence and style as sh...

item.title: Former AJK PM's security guard killed in Bagh district attack amid election tensions
item.description: A security guard was killed and others injured when a convoy of former Azad Jammu and Kashmir (AJK) Prime Minister Sardar Tanveer Ilyas came under gun attack in Bagh district. DIG Raja Akmal confirmed...

item.title: KZN Learner Transport Programme Struggles with Funding Gaps Amid Safety Concerns
item.description: The KwaZulu-Natal Department of Transport (DoT) has revealed that the learner transport programme, allocated R364 million for the 2026/27 financial year, faces a significant budget shortfall. MEC Sibo...

item.title: Dasmariñas Mayor Files Certificate of Candidacy for Cavite District Special Election on August 29
item.description: Incumbent Dasmariñas Mayor Jennifer Barzaga filed her certificate of candidacy (COC) for the special election of the lone congressional seat in the city on July 17, 2026. The filing was done at 2:38 p...

item.title: Ukraine's Kalush Orchestra Wins Eurovision 2023
item.description: Ukraine's Kalush Orchestra secured victory at the Eurovision Song Contest 2023, marking a historic moment for the nation. The contest, held in Liverpool, saw the band's entry 'Stefania' triumph over f...

item.title: Manitoba's Efforts to Preserve Peregrine Falcons and Falconry Tradition
item.description: Robert and Nancy Wheeldon have dedicated decades to conserving peregrine falcons and promoting falconry in Manitoba. Their Parkland Mews Falconry & Bird of Prey Education Centre Inc. focuses on public...

item.title: Strategies to Reduce Building Costs Amid Rising Cement Prices in Tanzania
item.description: Rising cement prices are increasing construction costs, but experts advise homeowners to adopt smarter building practices to manage expenses without compromising quality. The National Construction Cou...

item.title: Weekly Political Cartoons Highlight Key Issues and Satire
item.description: This article showcases a collection of political cartoons created by cartoonists across the United States, capturing the essence of recent political events through humor, critique, and satire. The car...

item.title: UN urges African leaders to combat $88bn illicit flows without stifling NGOs
item.description: The United Nations has called on African governments to combat illicit financial flows estimated at $88 billion annually while avoiding over-regulation of non-profit organizations. Ben Saul, UN Specia...

item.title: Baby Abducted from Hospital During Vaccination Appointment
item.description: A 42-day-old baby was allegedly abducted from Nguvu Kazi Hospital in Chanika, Dar es Salaam, during a routine vaccination visit on July 6, 2026. The infant's mother, Sharifa Kassim, recounted how a wo...

item.title: Sowetan's Daily Read Covers Telenovela, World Cup Final, and E-Hailing Success Stories
item.description: The article features a roundup of diverse stories from South Africa and beyond. It highlights the new telenovela 'Nyala O' starring Motlatsi Mafatshe and Mapaseka Koetle, which explores themes of betr...

item.title: Canadian politician pushes for transparency in Gordie Howe International Bridge agreement
item.description: In a recent development, Canadian politician Pierre Poilievre has publicly questioned Finance Minister Chrystia Freeland about the transparency of the Gordie Howe International Bridge agreement. The b...

item.title: Youth Advocates Urge Marcos Jr. to Prioritize Health Policies Ahead of SONA 2026
item.description: The Youth for Health Coalition, alongside lawmakers, is urging President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. to prioritize policies that address youth health challenges ahead of the 2026 State of the Nation Address ...

item.title: CIA Director John Ratcliffe Faces Scrutiny Over Memo Contradicting Trump's Claims on China Election Interference
item.description: In a heated exchange, MS NOW's David Rohde accused CIA Director John Ratcliffe of failing to explain his memo that contradicts President Donald Trump's claims about China's interference in the 2020 U....

item.title: Pauline Hanson's controversial overseas trip and political alliances spark debate
item.description: The article examines the growing controversy surrounding Pauline Hanson's recent overseas trip and her associations with figures like Tommy Robinson and Gina Rinehart. While Hanson's supporters often ...

item.title: Bagamoyo District Commits 800 Million Shillings to Expand Inclusive Education Facilities
item.description: The Bagamoyo District Council in Tanzania has allocated 800 million shillings to construct specialized educational facilities at Nianjema Primary School, aiming to enhance inclusive education for chil...

item.title: Kogi State Launches Multi-Agency Rescue Operation After School Attack
item.description: A group of gunmen attacked Government Secondary School in Olowa, Kogi State, during an ongoing NECO examination on July 15. The attackers abducted five individuals, including the school principal, a N...

item.title: PM Shehbaz Prioritizes Security of Chinese Nationals and Boosts Pakistan-China Economic Ties
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif emphasized the critical importance of ensuring the safety of Chinese citizens in Pakistan during his address at the Pakistan-China Pharmaceutical and Healthcare B2B Inves...

item.title: Dangote Refinery's Dollar Pricing Shift Impacts Nigerian Fuel Market and Naira Policy
item.description: Dangote Petroleum Refinery and Petrochemicals (DPRP) has reverted to selling domestic fuel in US dollars for the third time since March 2025, raising concerns about Nigeria’s naira-for-crude policy. T...
